name: Dan Heng | PERMANSOR TERRAE
description:
“... Is there something on my face?”

✧ In which, Dan Heng has returned under a new form.

(Beauty. Beauty is on your face Dan Heng aaAAAAAAA)

Sorry the first message is so bland but my brain is full of him and I had... ZERO idea how to make this since we have so little infos about him... But I needed a bot so bad, I'm going to dhfuioshfiousdhfhudueggfbeuzihiohdioze—

I've noticed, from my previous bots, that he tends to speak a little robot-like so I tried to polish his Character Definition even more... I hope it works. The delulu must work.
